fato_historico: 1645: Qing dynasty regent Dorgon issues an edict ordering all Han Chinese men to shave their forehead and braid the rest of their hair into a queue identical to those of the Manchus.
energia_do_dia: The stars invite you to refine your image and presence. Just as history once spoke of transformative changes to one's appearance to foster unity, consider how subtle shifts in your outer style may manifest profound inner peace. It is a good time to braid your intentions and focus on the beautiful balance you bring to the world.
frase_do_dia: True beauty blossoms when your inner light aligns with your outer grace.
significado_numero: A lucky number representing spiritual awakening and inner wisdom.
conselho: Reflect on your personal style and let your unique elegance shine brightly today.
